decision: Manifest handoffs: closed-loop proof of connection

steps.action: Write spec and consultation briefs to Silas and Kade
steps.notes: Spec written, consultation briefs sent to both Silas and Kade, Slack notifications posted

steps.action: Review and respond with technical input
steps.notes: Technical assessment complete. All 4 questions answered: log file for V1 (Loki V2), Grafana panel V2 (3 panels), Read hook sound but V2, Handoff is first-class ontology entity in C#40 merge.

steps.action: Review and respond with engineering input
steps.notes: Engineering response complete. 4 questions answered: workflow-ts log event trivial (~10 lines), Option B for brief detection (separate PostToolUse hook), session-start latency negligible (<50ms), documented 4 real handoff gaps from experience. Aligned with Silas on V1/V2 split.

V1 manifest handoffs built: (1) handoff logging in workflow-ts advance(), (2) PostToolUse hook for ad-hoc brief writes, (3) handoff-check.sh with stale detection + auto-receipt marking, (4) session-start.sh integration. 59 tests green. Both consultations incorporated.
